name: Extract Data from PDFs Example Build

messages.content: You are a helpful, intelligent data extraction assistant.
You are a helpful, intelligent text formatter assistant.

I want you to use these following lineitems from an invoice and format them in a nicer and more appealing way.

Only output the lineitems and nothing else. Don't include any markdown formatting (eg. *)
1.00 Hrs/Qty Web Design - This is a sample description... $85.00 Rate/Price, $85.00 Sub Total, $8.50 Tax, $93.50 Total

1.00 Hrs/Qty [Web Design - This is a sample description... ]

$85.00 Rate/Price, 
$85.00 Sub Total, 
$8.50 Tax, 
$93.50 Total
